title: Mayor Sharon F. Owens Announces the Return of Veo Fleet
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens announced the return of Veo's micromobility fleet to full capacity on March 9, 2026, following seasonal winter reduction. The 2025 season achieved 648,000 rides and 1M+ miles with 24% YoY growth; an updated operating agreement includes cargo baskets, enhanced community outreach, and accessibility improvements. Survey data shows 66% of riders lack car access and 52% use Veo to connect to transit, aligning with city sustainable transportation and equity goals.

political_signal.description: Mayor championship of micromobility as strategic infrastructure investment aligned with Vision Zero, equity, and sustainability commitments. Emphasizes multimodal transit access for unbanked/underbanked residents and environmental goals.

processing_notes: No specific CIO technology projects identified; micromobility program is operational/service-delivery focused rather than digital infrastructure
Contact: Office of Communications (press@syr.gov) and syrops@veoride.com for questions
Operating agreement is 2026-updated; full contract terms not disclosed in release
Potential duplicate of CTX-WEB-2026-00019 — linked for review
